summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. Tested admin auth (login/me), all admin CRUD endpoints (list/stats/patch/delete), DB admin seed (bcrypt $2b$), SEO static files (sitemap.xml/robots.txt/og-default.png/index.html meta), and full admin UI flow (login → dashboard → stats → filters → search → status update → delete with confirm → logout → protected-route redirect). Regression: public POST /api/enquiry now correctly returns 201 with status='new', GET /api/enquiries lists all items with status field, Helmet sets unique titles per public page. 24/24 backend pytest tests pass; 12/12 frontend Playwright assertions pass. No critical issues.

minor.issue: No brute-force lockout / rate-limit. Playbook recommends locking after 5 failed attempts. Not in the iteration-2 feature scope but worth adding.
Auth uses Bearer token in localStorage (not httpOnly cookie). Acceptable per implementation choice, but susceptible to XSS token theft — note for future hardening.

issues: StatCard renders '—' briefly while stats are loading (initial render before fetch resolves). Minor UX polish: show skeleton/'0' instead of em-dash.

action_items: (Optional) Add login rate-limit / account-lockout after 5 failed attempts on POST /api/auth/login.
(Optional) Replace em-dash placeholder on stat cards with '0' or skeleton during initial load.

Note: required a one-time `supervisorctl restart frontend` for the updated /public/index.html (og:image, twitter:card) to be served — CRA only bundles public/ on (re)start, so future edits to index.html need a frontend restart.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: bcrypt + JWT (HS256) implemented correctly; seed_admin is idempotent and updates hash if ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env changes. Verified $2b$ prefix in DB.

server.py: All admin routes correctly gated by Depends(require_admin); MongoDB _id excluded via projection in every read path. /api/enquiry POST returns 201 with default status='new'. Startup backfill ensures legacy rows get a status.

auth.js (frontend): Bearer token persisted in localStorage under 'dlas_admin_token'; 401 on any admin call correctly clears token and routes to /admin/login. formatApiErrorDetail handles FastAPI 422 array detail safely.
AdminDashboard.jsx: useMemo for client-side filter/search is efficient; native window.confirm used for delete (functional but not branded — consider shadcn AlertDialog later).
sitemap.xml & robots.txt are static under frontend/public/; both served at root with correct content. og-default.png served at /images/og-default.png (image/png).
Helmet titles unique per page verified at runtime: '/'='Dream\'s Latkans & Laces — Wholesale, Mumbai', '/products'='Wholesale Products — …', '/about'='About Us — …', '/contact'='Contact Us — …'.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (extended from 6 to 24 tests: added auth + admin CRUD + DB seed + SEO assertions; fixed pre-existing test that expected 200 to expect 201)
seed_data_creation: Tests create/delete TEST_-prefixed enquiries within each test (full create→patch→delete lifecycle). One enquiry was deleted by the UI test via the delete button (cardId 6d9b8d12-...).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py is the canonical regression set (run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=... pytest backend/tests/test_api.py`). Admin token endpoint: POST /api/auth/login → { token, email, role }; pass as Authorization: Bearer <token>. Token stored in localStorage key 'dlas_admin_token'. Sitemap has 4 URLs; robots.txt disallows /admin. index.html OG/Twitter tags require a frontend restart to refresh (CRA bundles public/ at start). Public URL: https://dreams-wholesale-1.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: Initial pytest run showed test_index_html_has_og_image_and_twitter_card failing because the React dev server was serving a cached /index.html from before the SEO meta tags were added. CRA's webpack dev server reads public/index.html at server start and does not hot-reload changes to it. Fix: `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` reloaded the new file and the served HTML then included og:image, og:image:width/height, twitter:card, twitter:image. After the restart all 24 tests pass.
